records.ety: [L. exaggeratus , p. p. of exaggerare to heap up; ex out + aggerare to heap up, fr. agger heap, aggerere to bring to; ad to + gerere to bear. See Jest. ]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Exaggerated (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Exaggerating . ]

defs: To amplify; to magnify; to enlarge beyond bounds or the truth ; to delineate extravagantly ; to overstate the truth concerning.
quotes: A friend exaggerates a man's virtues.
